title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXXIV. Jingles.
content:
Doodle, doodle, doo,
        The princess lost her shoe;
            Her highness hopp'd,
            The fidler stopped,
        Not knowing what to do.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXXIV. Jingles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
